subcodes.first_line: The missive hath attained unto the Divine Throne and been accepted, and that which thou didst write concerning the two martyrs hath been considered with glances of favor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب تلقاء عرش حاضر و فائز شد و آنچه باخوین شهیدین نوشته بودید بلحظات عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
